title: hotato deployment receipt, schema_version 1
description: A durable, hashable record of a clone, canary, or rollback in the fleet control plane. Deployment stays approval-gated and recommendation-only: a receipt records what was prepared or restored, it does not itself route traffic.

detail.description: Free-form record of what was prepared or restored (e.g. canary plan, adapter result, actor, timestamp). Not a traffic-routing instruction.

receipt_digest.description: sha256 over the canonical JSON of the receipt fields, computed before this key is inserted.
